parameters.name: num_planes
parameters.description: Number of planes in a data asset
parameters.help_text: Number of planes in a data asset

parameters.name: intensity_threshold
parameters.description: Intensity threshold for pass/fail single cell drift
parameters.help_text: Intensity threshold for pass/fail single cell drift

parameters.name: zdrift_calc_bin
parameters.description: Bin size (in minutes) for calculating z-drift min/max
parameters.help_text: Assumes matched plane indices from movie qc is done per minute

parameters.name: parallel
parameters.description: Whether to run planes in parallel (1) or sequentially (0)
parameters.help_text: Whether to run planes in parallel (1) or sequentially (0)

parameters.name: n_workers
parameters.description: Number of parallel workers to use. Only used when parallel=1
parameters.help_text: Number of parallel workers to use. Only used when parallel=1.
